<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Console\Exception; /** * Represents failure to read input from stdin. * * @author Gabriel Ostrolucký <gabriel.ostrolucky@gmail.com> */ class MissingInputException extends RuntimeException implements ExceptionInterface { }
